parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed XML/content where it was clearly faulty and added missing structural tagging only where appropriate. Main repairs: (1) normalized corrupted characters (e.g., 'Ga√üß'→'Gäß', 'sch√∂nen'→'schönen', 'Jen√§'→'Jena', 'Frantz√∂sischer'→'Frantzösischer'); (2) corrected one broken tag '<TITLE=in ...>' to valid '<TITLE>...</TITLE>'; (3) escaped '&' as '&' inside XML text; (4) regularized obvious OCR-like misreads in bibliographic abbreviations ('IT. Tomes'→'11. Tomes', '8v6'→'8vo', '4t√≤'→'4to'); (5) added a missing <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> in the Eyusd. entry for structural consistency with neighboring records; (6) standardized minor punctuation in format values ('fol'→'fol.').
